summary: Updated exchange tests for new CSV import approach. Exchange integration changed from API keys to CSV import - all old tests referencing /exchanges/connect, /exchanges/sync, etc. were removed and replaced with tests for the new endpoints. Fixed a bug in server.py where HTTPException was being caught by generic Exception handler causing 500 errors.

minor.issue: Affiliate code format tests failing - alphanumeric codes being rejected with 400 error. Pre-existing issue not related to exchange update.

seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exchange CSV Import feature fully tested. New endpoints tested: GET /api/exchanges/supported (6 exchanges), GET /api/exchanges/export-instructions/{id}, POST /api/exchanges/import-csv (Unlimited only), GET /api/exchanges/transactions (Unlimited only), DELETE /api/exchanges/transactions. ExchangeModal UI shows CSV upload interface with exchange cards that expand to show export instructions. Free users get 403 when trying to import CSV. Fixed bug in server.py - HTTPException was being caught by generic Exception handler.
features_verified: GET /api/exchanges/supported - returns 6 exchanges with export instructions
POST /api/exchanges/import-csv - requires auth and Unlimited, rejects non-CSV files
DELETE /api/exchanges/transactions - deletes imported transactions with optional exchange filter
ExchangeModal UI shows CSV upload interface
Free users blocked from CSV import (403)

bug_fixed.issue: HTTPException in import_exchange_csv was being caught by generic Exception handler, returning 500 instead of proper status codes
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'except HTTPException: raise' before the generic Exception catch
